name: Vegetarian Ham (Buddhist)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bean curd in water for about 30 minutes until soft.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Place the softened bean curd in the bowl and marinate for about 2 hours.
4. Lay the largest, smoothest sheet of bean curd on a flat surface.
5. Arrange the remaining sheets evenly over the first sheet to form a cylinder with regular dimensions.
6. Roll up the layered bean curd tightly using cheese-cloth or an old sheet to prevent tearing.
7. Tie the bundle securely at both ends.
8. Steam the roll for about 1 hour until fully cooked.
9. Remove from heat and let cool.
10. Slice the roll into 1/4-inch slices and serve cold.
